source: Brese & O'Keeffe (1991) Acta Cryst. B47, 192-197; universal b=0.37. O values from Table 2 (oxide/fluoride/chloride). N/S are oxidation-state-II values cross-referenced to softBV — verify against the canonical bvparm2020.cif before quantitative use, as N/S parameters are oxidation-state-sensitive.
